cells.label:
Protocolbit 통신 신호를 
내부 신호로 해석

Protocol
bit 통신 신호를 
내부 신호로 해석

검증 환경
통신 및 register 결과를 검증 (UVM 등)

Protocolbit 통신 신호를 
내부 신호로 해석

busy = 1latch clk_div, addr, 
rw, ack_in ,txload {target_addr, rw}
Controller ASM 너무 복잡하다.. FSM으로만 끝내기로함 ㅅㄱ
SPI_target — FSM (MODE0, CPOL=0, CPHA=0, MSB-first, 1 byte)

busy = 0
release SCL, SDA
clear step, bit_cnt

step 0: release SCL, SDA
step 1: keep SCL released, drive SDA low
step 2: drive SCL low, keep SDA low

step 0: SCL low, drive SDA low if TX[bit]=0
step 1: release SCL high
step 2: hold data stable
step 3: drive SCL low, shift byte

step 0: release SDA, keep SCL low
step 1: release SCL high
step 2: sample ACK as ack_seen = ~sda
step 3: drive SCL low

step 0: release SDA, keep SCL low
step 1: release SCL high
step 2: sample SDA into RX shift register
step 3: drive SCL low

step 0: drive SDA per ack_in_r
step 1: release SCL high
step 2: hold ACK/NACK phase
step 3: drive SCL low, release SDA

step 0: drive SCL low, SDA low
step 1: release SCL high, keep SDA low
step 2: release SDA (SCL high)
also goto CTRL_GEN_STOP from data phase branch
